entries.title: EU AI Act published in the Official Journal
entries.description: Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 published. Entry into force: 1 August 2024.

entries.title: Prohibited practices (Article 5) become enforceable
entries.description: First enforcement milestone. Social scoring, subliminal manipulation, exploitation of vulnerabilities, certain biometric uses, and workplace/education emotion recognition are now prohibited.

entries.title: GPAI obligations become enforceable
entries.description: General-purpose AI model providers must comply with transparency and documentation obligations.

entries.title: Digital Omnibus on AI proposed
entries.description: European Commission proposes delaying Annex III high-risk obligations by up to 6 months after harmonised standards are ready (maximum December 2027). Links compliance timeline to standards availability.
